methodology: Competitor feature matrix analysis + gap identification by payment, access, speed, integration, pricing dimensions

gaps.gap_description: Top Peppertype and Sudowrite require sales calls or demo bookings for enterprise features
gaps.opportunity: Offer fully self-serve access to all features

gaps.gap_description: All Peppertype and Sudowrite use monthly subscriptions — no pay-per-use option
gaps.opportunity: Offer micro-pricing ($0.10-$2.00 per use) to capture price-sensitive users

gaps.gap_description: No competitor supports x402/USDC micropayments for API access
gaps.opportunity: First-mover in crypto-native payments for this niche

gaps.gap_description: Zero Peppertype and Sudowrite have mobile-first or responsive API docs
Competitors average 3-8 second response times for core features
gaps.opportunity: Build sub-second API responses for real-time use cases

gaps.gap_description: Zero Peppertype and Sudowrite have agent-to-agent (A2A) API endpoints
gaps.opportunity: Capture the autonomous agent buyer market segment
